cleavage agent: Sample was digested by trypsin with prior reduction and alkylation
collision energy: followed by 20 data-dependent MS/MS scans at 30% normalized collision energy
instrument: directly interfaced with a Thermo Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
labeling: the weight loss was used to evaluate the PVC-degradation activity of proteins in the four groups: IN, OUT, Inglu, and OUTglu.
